title: quikrun
description: Configuration for quikrun, a CLI tool to run code files instantly without typing complex commands in terminal.

shell.description: Custom shell to run commands in (e.g., 'bash', 'zsh', 'sh')

clear_terminal.description: Whether to clear the terminal before executing commands

show_time_took.description: Show time taken to execute the script

show_command.description: Print the actual command that is being run

show_shell.description: Display the shell being used for execution

show_divider.description: Print a divider line before command stdout/stderr

temp_dir.description: Directory to store temporary execution files

cd_to_file_dir.description: Change directory to the folder containing the file before execution

keep_artifacts.description: Keep generated binaries or temporary files after execution

commands.description: Mapping of file extensions to custom runner configurations

temp_file.description: Whether to copy the file to a temporary location before executing

compile.description: Command template to compile the file before running (e.g. 'g++ {file} -o {bin}')
